compiled_state.title: Update fix-bug SKILL.md for worktree isolation dispatch
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Modify fix-bug SKILL.md to reference shared worktree-dispatch.md at its sub-agent dispatch point. Add isolation:worktree conditionally based on config.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md (EDIT — safeguard file, authorized by story scope)

### TDD Requirement
RED eval from task T4 must turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Fix-bug eval passes
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references worktree-dispatch.md
  Verify: grep -q 'worktree-dispatch' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — eval tests at lines 244-302 require fix-bug SKILL.md to document worktree isolation dispatch via worktree-dispatch.md for both investigation (Step 2) and implementation (Step 6) sub-agents
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — added worktree-dispatch.md reference at Step 2 (investigation dispatch, line 340) and Step 6 (fix implementation, line 687); both include conditional isolation:worktree when enabled and ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT passthrough
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Eval passed ✓ — 9/9 tests pass (100%) including both worktree isolation test cases (BUG-7741 isolation:worktree when enabled, BUG-8812 no isolation when disabled)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — both acceptance criteria satisfied: (1) fix-bug eval passes 9/9, (2) SKILL.md references worktree-dispatch.md at Step 2 (line 340) and Step 6 (line 687)

comments.body: Fixed: Fix-bug SKILL.md updated for worktree isolation. 9/9 evals GREEN.
